runTitle: Local dev turbopack trace - Tailwind source scope fix

completedImprovements.title: Limit Tailwind source scanning to actual app code
completedImprovements.note: Changed Tailwind v4 from automatic source detection to source(none) with explicit src code directories only. This removed non-app text assets from CSS scanning and collapsed cold dev route compile from about 196-198s to 17-18s.

completedImprovements.title: Defer auth/session/store heavy imports on the root path
completedImprovements.note: Async boundaries for auth-state-manager, supabase client, and browser notification service improved the startup probe before the Tailwind fix and remain as secondary startup cleanup.

notes: This completion run passed npm run type-check and npm run lint after the Tailwind source scope change.
Cold / completed in 18s with trace size 106,834,861 bytes.
Cold /dashboard completed in 17s with trace size 164,997,221 bytes.
Compared with QA-20260422-0328, the shared route compile bottleneck is no longer in the same severity class, so root-shell-startup-trace can be closed.
